summary: Your Spring 2026 Pay Now button is active for Amaya's Seekers | Brighton enrollment. Remaining balance: $520.00.
How to pay: sign in at accounts.americanseekersacademy.com → Payments → Upcoming Payments → click Pay Now and complete checkout.

If the portal shows an unexpected amount or Pay Now fails, reply to this email.
